tests.name: analyzes project personality
tests.prompt: /font-matchmaker — This project is a real-time stock trading dashboard for institutional investors. It needs to feel trustworthy and precise.

assert.description: Should assess the project's personality on defined axes

tests.name: recommends specific fonts not generic advice
tests.prompt: Recommend fonts for a developer CLI tool that helps with Git workflows. It's opinionated and fast.

assert.description: Should recommend specific font names, not generic categories

tests.name: explains WHY with design characteristics
tests.prompt: Why are you recommending that font for my developer tool?

assert.description: Should reference actual typographic design characteristics in reasoning

tests.name: different recommendation for warm consumer app
tests.prompt: /font-matchmaker — This is a meditation and wellness app for everyday people. It should feel calm, approachable, and human.

assert.description: Should recommend warmer, rounder fonts for a wellness app — not geometric tech fonts

tests.name: includes implementation details
tests.prompt: Give me the full font recommendation for my Next.js SaaS dashboard with implementation details.

tests.name: recommends font pairing not single font
tests.prompt: What fonts should I use for a legal tech platform that handles contract management?

assert.description: Should recommend a font system with heading and body, not just one font

tests.name: check command evaluates current fonts
tests.prompt: /font-matchmaker check — My developer documentation site currently uses Comic Sans for headings and Papyrus for body text.

assert.description: Should flag the obvious mismatch between casual fonts and a technical documentation context

tests.name: why command analyzes fit
tests.prompt: /font-matchmaker why Playfair Display — my project is a Kubernetes monitoring tool

assert.description: Should explain why a display serif doesn't fit a DevOps monitoring tool

tests.name: provides alternatives on personality axes
tests.prompt: I like your recommendation but I want something with more personality and less corporate feeling.

assert.description: Should offer alternatives that shift along the personality axes the user specified

tests.name: size scale and hierarchy recommendation
tests.prompt: What font sizes should I use with this recommendation? Give me the full type scale.

assert.description: Should provide a typographic scale with specific sizes and ratios
